homepage.heroSubline: Durable, beautiful floors expertly installed and built to last. Serving Long Beach and surrounding areas with pride.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Flooring Expertise in Long Beach
aboutText: A & K Carpet and Flooring started with a simple mission: to provide Long Beach homeowners and businesses with flooring solutions that stand the test of time. Founded by two local craftsmen, we've grown from a small team to a trusted name in the community.

We believe in doing things the right way, every time. This means using quality materials, employing skilled installers, and communicating openly with our clients. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every project we undertake, from small repairs to complete home renovations.

We're proud to be a part of the Long Beach community, and we're committed to giving back. We regularly support local schools and organizations, and we strive to be a responsible and ethical business in everything we do.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our skilled team ensures flawless installation, minimizing disruptions and maximizing the lifespan of your floors.

valueProps.title: Wide Selection
valueProps.description: Choose from a vast array of flooring options, from classic hardwood to modern waterproof vinyl, all sourced from reputable suppliers.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand the unique challenges of Long Beach homes, including moisture, earthquake risk, and the impact of the coastal climate.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with a comprehensive satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free consultation and discover the perfect flooring solution for your Long Beach home or business.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring Installation & Refinishing
services.shortDescription: Timeless beauty and lasting value with expert hardwood services.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring adds warmth and character to any Long Beach home. We specialize in hardwood installation, refinishing, and repair. Considering the age of many homes in the area, especially the Craftsman styles in Belmont Shore and Bixby Knolls, hardwood is a popular choice. We handle everything from selecting the right wood species to ensuring a flawless finish.

Our installation process includes careful subfloor preparation, precise cutting and fitting, and expert nailing or gluing. We understand the importance of proper acclimation to prevent warping or cracking, given Long Beach's coastal climate. For existing hardwood floors, our refinishing services can restore their original luster, removing scratches, dents, and discoloration. We use dustless sanding equipment to minimize mess and disruption.

We also offer hardwood repair services, addressing issues such as water damage, loose boards, and squeaks. Our team can seamlessly match existing wood and finishes to ensure a cohesive look. From classic oak to exotic hardwoods, we have the expertise to handle any hardwood flooring project.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Long Beach?
faq.answer: Harder woods like oak or maple are great choices for Long Beach homes due to their durability and resistance to moisture. Engineered hardwood is also a good option for areas prone to humidity.

faq.question: How long does hardwood installation take?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but typically ranges from 2-5 days. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Generally, you should refinish your hardwood floors every 7-10 years, depending on the amount of traffic and wear. Regular cleaning and maintenance can help extend the life of your finish.

services.name: Laminate Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable, affordable, and stylish laminate flooring solutions.
services.description:
Laminate flooring is a cost-effective and versatile option for Long Beach homeowners. It offers the look of hardwood or tile at a fraction of the price, and it's highly resistant to scratches, stains, and fading. This makes it a great choice for families with pets or children, especially in the more modern condos found near the waterfront.

We offer a wide selection of laminate styles and colors to suit any décor. Our installation process includes careful subfloor preparation, precise cutting, and secure locking of the planks. We use moisture barriers to protect against humidity, which is essential in Long Beach's coastal environment. Laminate is a great alternative to hardwood in areas where moisture is a concern.

We ensure a smooth and seamless installation, paying attention to detail and minimizing disruption to your home. Laminate flooring is easy to clean and maintain, making it a practical choice for busy families. We also offer laminate repair services, addressing issues such as chipped edges or loose planks.

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate is water-resistant, it's not completely waterproof. However, we offer waterproof laminate options that are ideal for bathrooms, kitchens, and laundry rooms.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care and maintenance, laminate flooring can last 15-25 years. The lifespan depends on the quality of the laminate and the amount of traffic it receives.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While DIY installation is possible, professional installation ensures a proper fit, prevents moisture damage, and maximizes the lifespan of your floors. We recommend professional installation for the best results.

services.name: Luxury Vinyl Plank & Tile (LVP/LVT)
services.shortDescription: Waterproof, stylish, and durable vinyl flooring for any room.
services.description:
Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) and Luxury Vinyl Tile (LVT) are rapidly growing in popularity in Long Beach due to their exceptional durability, waterproof properties, and stylish designs. They're perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, laundry rooms, and any area prone to moisture. Given the older homes near Belmont Shore and the waterfront properties, vinyl offers a stylish and resilient flooring option.

We offer a wide range of LVP and LVT options, including wood-look planks, stone-look tiles, and modern patterns. Our installation process includes careful subfloor preparation, precise cutting, and secure adhesion or locking of the planks. We use high-quality adhesives and sealants to ensure a waterproof and long-lasting installation.

LVP and LVT are incredibly easy to clean and maintain, making them a practical choice for busy families. They're also comfortable underfoot and offer excellent sound insulation. We also offer vinyl repair services, addressing issues such as scratches, dents, or loose planks. With its versatility and durability, LVP/LVT flooring is a great investment.

faq.question: Is LVP flooring suitable for bathrooms?
faq.answer: Yes, LVP flooring is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its waterproof properties. It can withstand spills, splashes, and humidity without warping or damage.

faq.question: How long does LVP flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care and maintenance, LVP flooring can last 20-30 years. The lifespan depends on the quality of the vinyl and the amount of traffic it receives.

faq.question: Can LVP be installed over existing flooring?
faq.answer: In many cases, LVP can be installed over existing flooring if the surface is level and in good condition. We'll assess your subfloor during the consultation to determine the best approach.

services.name: Carpet Installation & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Comfort, warmth, and style with our professional carpet services.
services.description:
Carpet provides warmth, comfort, and sound insulation, making it a popular choice for bedrooms, living rooms, and family rooms in Long Beach homes. We offer a wide selection of carpet styles, colors, and textures to suit any décor. We understand the importance of choosing the right carpet for your lifestyle and budget.

Our installation process includes removing existing flooring, preparing the subfloor, installing padding, and stretching and securing the carpet. We use professional-grade tools and techniques to ensure a smooth and wrinkle-free installation. We also offer carpet repair services, addressing issues such as stains, tears, and loose seams. Regular cleaning and maintenance can extend the life of your carpet.

Given the warm climate in Long Beach, stain-resistant carpets are a great choice. We can help you select a carpet that is both comfortable and durable. From plush textures to Berber styles, we have the expertise to handle any carpet installation project.

faq.question: What type of carpet is best for high-traffic areas?
faq.answer: For high-traffic areas, we recommend a low-pile carpet made from durable fibers such as nylon or polyester. These carpets are resistant to crushing and staining.

faq.question: How often should I clean my carpets?
faq.answer: We recommend professional carpet cleaning every 12-18 months to remove dirt, allergens, and stains. Regular vacuuming can also help extend the life of your carpet.

faq.question: What is the best way to remove stains from carpet?
faq.answer: Act quickly and blot the stain with a clean cloth. Avoid rubbing the stain, as this can spread it. Use a carpet stain remover specifically designed for the type of stain.

services.name: Tile Installation (Kitchen, Bath, Floors)
services.shortDescription: Durable and beautiful tile for kitchens, bathrooms, and floors.
services.description:
Tile is a versatile and durable flooring option for kitchens, bathrooms, and other areas in Long Beach homes. It's resistant to water, stains, and scratches, making it an ideal choice for high-moisture environments. We offer a wide selection of tile styles, colors, and sizes to suit any décor.

Our installation process includes preparing the subfloor, applying mortar, setting the tiles, and grouting. We use precise cutting and leveling techniques to ensure a flawless and long-lasting installation. We also offer tile repair services, addressing issues such as cracked or chipped tiles. Given the potential for earthquakes in the area, we use flexible grout to help prevent cracking.

From ceramic and porcelain to natural stone, we have the expertise to handle any tile installation project. We can help you select the right tile for your specific needs and budget. Tile is a great way to add value and style to your Long Beach home.

faq.question: What type of tile is best for bathrooms?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its water resistance and durability. It's also available in a wide range of styles and colors.

faq.question: How often should I seal my grout?
faq.answer: We recommend sealing your grout every 1-2 years to prevent stains and moisture damage. Sealing the grout will help keep your tile looking its best.

faq.question: Can I install tile over existing tile?
faq.answer: In some cases, you can install tile over existing tile if the surface is level and in good condition. We'll assess your subfloor during the consultation to determine the best approach.

services.name: Floor Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert repairs for all types of flooring: hardwood, laminate, vinyl, and tile.
services.description:
Floors endure a lot of wear and tear, and sometimes they need a little TLC. A & K Carpet and Flooring offers comprehensive floor repair services for all types of flooring, including hardwood, laminate, vinyl, and tile. Whether you have water damage, scratches, dents, or loose boards, we can restore your floors to their original condition.

Our repair process includes assessing the damage, identifying the cause, and implementing the appropriate repair techniques. We use high-quality materials and tools to ensure a long-lasting repair. We can seamlessly match existing wood, laminate, or tile to ensure a cohesive look. For older homes in Long Beach, matching the existing flooring is critical.

We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your home during the repair process. We work efficiently and carefully to complete the repairs as quickly as possible. From small patches to extensive repairs, we have the expertise to handle any floor repair project.

faq.question: How much does floor repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of floor repair depends on the type and extent of the damage. We offer free estimates to assess the damage and provide a detailed quote.

faq.question: Can you repair water-damaged flooring?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair water-damaged flooring. However, it's important to address the water leak or source of moisture before repairing the flooring to prevent further damage.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency floor repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency floor repair services for urgent situations such as water damage or structural issues. Contact us anytime for immediate assistance.

services.name: Commercial Flooring Solutions
services.shortDescription: Durable and stylish flooring for businesses in Long Beach.
services.description:
A & K Carpet and Flooring provides commercial flooring solutions for businesses of all sizes in Long Beach. We understand the unique needs of commercial spaces, including durability, safety, and aesthetics. We offer a wide selection of commercial flooring options, including carpet, vinyl, tile, and epoxy coatings.

Our commercial flooring services include installation, repair, and maintenance. We work closely with business owners and property managers to select the right flooring for their specific needs and budget. Given the high foot traffic in commercial spaces, we recommend durable and easy-to-clean flooring options.

We have experience installing flooring in a variety of commercial settings, including offices, retail stores, restaurants, and warehouses. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your business during the installation process. We work efficiently and carefully to complete the project on time and within budget.

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for a retail store?
faq.answer: For retail stores, we recommend durable and easy-to-clean flooring options such as vinyl or tile. These materials can withstand high foot traffic and are resistant to stains and scratches.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for commercial flooring projects?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer financing options for qualified commercial customers. Contact us to learn more about our financing programs.

faq.question: How long does commercial flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

serviceAreas.content:
A & K Carpet and Flooring proudly serves the diverse flooring needs of Los Angeles, California. From the iconic Hollywood Hills to the vibrant downtown area, we bring our expertise to homes and businesses across the city. Whether you're renovating a classic 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival home or updating a modern loft, our wide selection of flooring options and professional installation services will enhance your space.

Los Angeles' warm, dry climate year-round demands flooring that can withstand the sun and maintain its beauty. We offer a variety of durable and stylish options, including hardwood, tile, and luxury vinyl, specifically chosen to thrive in the Southern California environment. Our team is familiar with the unique architectural styles of Los Angeles and can help you select the perfect flooring to complement your home's character. We're committed to providing exceptional service and quality craftsmanship to our Los Angeles customers.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles is known for its diverse architecture, including many 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival homes, and its warm, dry climate year-round.

serviceAreas.content:

With Pasadena's warm, dry climate, choosing the right flooring is essential. Our experienced team can help you select the perfect flooring to match your home's aesthetic and withstand the test of time. We are dedicated to providing top-quality products and exceptional installation services to our Pasadena clients.

We offer a variety of durable and water-resistant options, including luxury vinyl plank, tile, and sealed concrete. Our team can help you choose the best flooring to suit your needs and complement your home's aesthetic. We are dedicated to providing exceptional service and quality craftsmanship to our Huntington Beach customers.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: A & K Carpet and Flooring did an amazing job installing LVP in my kitchen and bathroom. The floors look fantastic, and the team was professional and efficient. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our hardwood floors were looking tired and worn, but A & K Carpet and Flooring brought them back to life! The refinishing process was quick and clean, and the floors now have a beautiful shine. There were a few minor scheduling hiccups, but they were quickly resolved.

reviews.name: Lisa B.
reviews.text: I needed new carpet installed in my living room, and A & K Carpet and Flooring provided excellent service. They helped me choose the perfect carpet, and the installation was flawless. The installers were friendly and professional, and they cleaned up everything afterward.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: A & K Carpet and Flooring installed new tile in my bathroom, and I couldn't be happier with the results. The tile work is beautiful, and the team paid attention to every detail. I highly recommend them for tile installation projects.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: I had some water damage to my laminate flooring, and A & K Carpet and Flooring was able to repair it quickly and effectively. The repair is seamless, and you can't even tell there was any damage. Great work!

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: A & K Carpet and Flooring installed new commercial-grade carpet in our office building. The team was professional, efficient, and responsive to our needs. The new carpet looks great, and it's holding up well to the heavy foot traffic. We highly recommend them for commercial flooring projects.
